## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (behavior change visible in SillyTavern UI or chat flow)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling only

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run knip` reports no unused dependencies or dead code
- [ ] `npm run jscpd` runs clean (or duplicates are justified in code comments)
- [ ] AGENTS.md sections affected by API/architecture changes are updated
- [ ] README updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Context for reviewers (optional)
- Links to related issues, screenshots, or Slack threads.
